title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
